name: Basic Pastry
recipeInstructions:
Combine the flour and salt in a bowl. Cut in the shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
Sprinkle cold water, one tablespoon at a time, evenly over the surface. Stir with a fork until the dry ingredients are moistened. Form into a ball and chill.
To fit into the pie plate, roll the dough to an 1/8-inch thickness on a lightly floured surface. Place in the pie plate and trim off excess pastry along the edges. Fold the edges under and flute them.
For baked pastry shells, prick the bottom and sides of the pastry generously with a fork. Bake at 450 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown. Yield: pastry for one 8-inch, 9-inch, or 10-inch pie.
